OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Whether the connector should run automatically when an entity is created or updated.

POLYSWARM_TIMEOUT.description: HTTP timeout for PolySwarm API calls in seconds.

POLYSWARM_MAX_TLP.description: Max TLP level of entities to enrich.

POLYSWARM_REPLACE_WITH_LOWER_SCORE.description: If false, keep higher existing score instead of overwriting.

POLYSWARM_SANDBOX_ENABLED.description: Enable sandbox analysis in addition to scan.

POLYSWARM_SANDBOX_PROVIDER.description: Sandbox provider: cape, triage, or both.

POLYSWARM_SANDBOX_VM_CAPE.description: VM slug for Cape sandbox submissions.

POLYSWARM_SANDBOX_VM_TRIAGE.description: VM slug for Triage sandbox submissions.

POLYSWARM_SANDBOX_VM.description: Legacy single VM slug (overrides per-provider if set).

POLYSWARM_SANDBOX_NETWORK_ENABLED.description: Enable internet access during sandbox analysis.

POLYSWARM_SANDBOX_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum wait time for sandbox results in seconds.

POLYSWARM_POLL_INTERVAL.description: Seconds between poll attempts for scan/sandbox results.

POLYSWARM_POLL_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum wait time for scan results in seconds.

POLYSWARM_JSON_REPORT_ENABLED.description: Attach raw JSON scan/sandbox data as a file.

POLYSWARM_PDF_REPORT_ENABLED.description: Request and attach PDF report from PolySwarm.

POLYSWARM_LLM_REPORT_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum wait time for LLM report in seconds.

POLYSWARM_CREATE_INDICATORS.description: Create STIX Indicator objects from scan results.

POLYSWARM_CREATE_OBSERVABLES.description: Create STIX Observable objects from sandbox IOCs.

POLYSWARM_DOWNLOAD_ARTIFACTS.description: Download file artifacts from OpenCTI for scanning.

POLYSWARM_POLYKG_API_URL.description: polykg REST API URL for malware profile enrichment (empty = disabled).
